title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.100 - Sheriff and jury may act in adjoining county
text:
236.100.  Sheriff and jury may act in adjoining county. — The sheriff and jury may enter and act in an adjoining county when necessary to the discharge of their duties.
(RSMo 1939 § 10295) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9166; 1919 § 7408; 1909 § 5465
